column3: Fix deepcopy/pickle of DAGCircuit variable IO nodes
column9: When a DAGCircuit was loaded, some output nodes could be incorrectly treated as input nodes. This can damage the circuit’s structure, but there is no evidence that transpilation crashed.

column3: Do not contract control-flow operations during SabreSwap
column9: SabreSwap removed dependencies that were important.Due to this, transpiled circuit could behave incorrectly.
